title: Nursery Rhyme. DCVIII. Local.
content:
I lost my mare in Lincoln lane,
            And couldn't tell where to find her,
        Till she came home both lame and blind,
            With never a tail behind her.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DCVIII. Local."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
